headers.description: Optional. Bearer ps_live_<api_key> unlocks all 8 tools and full fields. Without it, 4 tools (NPI lookup, search, territory, Medicaid rates) work on a free tier with per-IP daily caps. Keys: https://providersignal.com/settings/api-keys.
